goal: finite_event_indicator(a, x) * finite_event_indicator(b, x) = Real.1 * Real.1

proof: function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0, x2: FiniteSet[T0]) { finite_event_indicator[T0](x0, x1) * finite_event_indicator[T0](x2, x1) = finite_event_indicator_product[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[T](a, x, b)
